data.narrative: The student successfully created a runnable Express service with environment-based configuration and a working health endpoint. They justified the single-app project layout, verified the application with reproducible evidence, and completed a regression check after validating the PORT configuration.

dimension_scores.observation: Chose a single-app repository and explained the deployment and simplicity tradeoffs.
dimension_scores.evidence: Selected single-app because it reduces setup complexity and simplifies deployment.

dimension_scores.observation: Verified configuration before concluding the issue was resolved.
dimension_scores.evidence: Checked process.env.PORT usage, verified .env, restarted the server, and re-ran the health endpoint.

dimension_scores.observation: Recognized the importance of configuration management and separating public and protected endpoints.
dimension_scores.evidence: Explained why redirect endpoints are public while administration endpoints require protection.

dimension_scores.observation: Verified the application using repeatable startup and health checks.
dimension_scores.evidence: Started the server successfully and confirmed GET /health returned HTTP 200.

dimension_scores.observation: Provided concise reasoning and supporting evidence throughout the module.
dimension_scores.evidence: Explained decisions together with verification steps.

strengths: Validated configuration changes using reproducible commands before considering the task complete.
data.recommendation: Continue applying the same verify-before-progress approach as persistence and authentication are introduced in later modules.

public_evidence.student_action: Implemented and verified a health endpoint using environment-based configuration.
public_evidence.technical_detail: Express server using process.env.PORT with GET /health.
public_evidence.proof: Server started successfully and GET /health returned HTTP 200 with {"status":"ok"}.
public_evidence.ability: Can build and validate a minimal production-ready service foundation.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Demonstrates understanding of configuration management and service verification.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Used process.env.PORT and verified startup using .env.

teaching_approaches.detail: Used PORT verification and health endpoint regression testing.
